[RR-001] #### RR-001. `Gdx2DPixmap` is still stub-only, so Pixmap-backed rendering remains blocked
[RR-002] #### RR-002. Physics extension links against the wrong native library name
[RR-004] #### RR-004. Physics ray-cast result encoding is incorrect and loses handle information
[RR-005] #### RR-005. Android Panama provider is a compile-time stub, so JVM-side FFI helpers are not Android-ready
[RR-007] #### RR-007. Extension modules have effectively no direct test suite
[RR-008] #### RR-008. CI validates only the core `sge` test task and misses extension-module regressions
[RR-009] #### RR-009. `sge-freetype` and `sge-physics` are cross-built for Scala.js even though their JS implementations are runtime stubs
[RR-010] #### RR-010. The default 3D particle-effect loader is still structurally stubbed and appears unusable
[RR-012] #### RR-012. `TextFormatter` is still a simplified placeholder, so `I18NBundle.format` semantics diverge from LibGDX
[RR-013] #### RR-013. `SgeNativesLoader.load()` is a compatibility shell that marks natives as loaded without actually loading anything
[RR-015] #### RR-015. Binary `.g3db` model loading is missing because `UBJsonReader` has not been ported
[RR-016] #### RR-016. Multiple important end-to-end loader flows are still explicitly untested
[RR-017] #### RR-017. Several canonical real-asset decoding flows are still missing end-to-end tests
[CR-001] #### CR-001. No tests for Game or Screen flow
**Files:** `sge/src/main/scala/sge/Game.scala`, `sge/src/main/scala/sge/Screen.scala`; test search shows no `Game`/`Screen`/`setScreen`/`screen_=` in tests.
[CR-006] #### CR-006. BitmapFontCache.setColors / draw(Batch, start, end) — break() exits whole method
[CR-007] #### CR-007. ComparableTimSort and ObjLoader use raw null
[CR-009] #### CR-009. No flow test for AssetManager → Loader → resource
[CR-010] #### CR-010. All concrete asset loaders documented as untested
[CR-011] #### CR-011. RefCountedContainer uses var obj: Any = null
[CR-012] #### CR-012. compareTo / compare stubs in light attributes and DefaultShader
[CR-017] #### CR-017. Pool.Poolable TODOs for Scene2D and g3d types
[CR-019] #### CR-019. SpriteCache tempVertices — possible shared mutable state
[CR-020] #### CR-020. Scene2D has almost no tests
[CR-022] #### CR-022. Tiled map loaders use null / orNull
[CR-024] #### CR-024. RemoteInput has unwired postRunnable and stub behavior
[CR-026] #### CR-026. No integration tests for rendering, input, or asset flows
